title: WorldLimit Fabric
description: Restricts access to specific dimensions based on XP, PlayerEX level, and other conditions.
body:
# 🌍 WorldLimit – Dimension Access Restriction Mod

**WorldLimit** is a powerful server-side Fabric mod that allows you to **restrict player access to specific dimensions** based on configurable progression requirements.

Use it to gate high-level worlds like **The End**, **Twilight Forest**, or **Eden Ring** behind XP, PlayerEX level, or (soon) item-based milestones. Perfect for RPG servers, MMO experiences, or story-driven modpacks.

---

## 🔐 Key Features

- **Block World Access**  
  Stop players from entering configured dimensions unless they meet defined requirements.

- **Custom Requirements (Per World)**
  - ✅ [PlayerEX: Director’s Cut](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerex-directors-cut) level
  - ✅ Vanilla XP amount
  - 🔜 Item requirements *(coming soon)*

- **Smart Teleport Detection**  
  Cancels dimension changes from portals, commands, or modded mechanics.

- **Safe Teleport Fallback**  
  Sends unauthorized players back to their last known safe location.

- **Portal Pushback**  
  Pushes players away from custom portal blocks if entry is denied.

- **Permission Support**  
  Bypass restrictions with permissions or operator status.

- **Hot Reloading**  
  Modify config files and apply changes instantly with `/worldlimit reload`.

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

All configs are stored in:  

`config/WorldLimit/`


- `worldlimit_config.jsonc` – Define world access requirements  
- `portal_blocks.json` – Define portal blocks to watch

---

## 🧪 Compatibility

- ✔ Server-side only (no client required)
- ✔ Works with PlayerEX: Director’s Cut
- 🔧 More integrations coming soon

---

## 💡 Use Cases

- Lock **The End** until players reach level 50
- Gate **Twilight Forest** behind XP and item collection
- Prevent early access to modded dimensions
- Create tiered progression for RPG servers

---

## 🔮 Upcoming Features

- Mob kill requirements
- Item + NBT checks
- Timed unlocks (playtime-based)
- GUI warnings and feedback

---

## 📢 Support

Have a feature request or bug report?  
[Submit issues on GitHub]((https://github.com/MysticHorizons-MC/WorldLimit-Fabric/issues))

---

## 🛠 License

WorldLimit is open-source and licensed under the **MIT License**. You’re free to use, modify, and include it in your modpacks.

---

Make your Minecraft server feel like a true journey — with **WorldLimit**, only the worthy progress.
